summary: Tested new feature batch: Bundles, Last Chance, Friend Battle, Reviews, and Apple Login button. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load correctly with proper UI elements, data-testid attributes, and German translations.

minor.issue: Returns inconsistent response - 'bonus_per_review' field only included when there are pending reviews, not when empty

last_chance_api.GET /api/last-chance/ending-soon: PASS - Returns time brackets (under_1_min, under_5_min, under_15_min, under_1_hour)
last_chance_api.GET /api/last-chance/hot: PASS - Returns hot auctions with heat_level
last_chance_api.GET /api/last-chance/auctions: PASS - Returns auctions with minutes parameter
last_chance_api.auction_structure: PASS - Each auction has id, product, remaining_seconds, current_price

friend_battle_api.GET /api/friend-battle/types: PASS - Returns 4 battle types (most_bids, first_win, most_savings, bid_streak)
friend_battle_api.GET /api/friend-battle/my-battles: PASS - Returns battles with auth (pending_received, pending_sent, active, completed)

reviews_api.GET /api/reviews/public: PASS - Returns reviews array with average_rating
reviews_api.GET /api/reviews/my-pending: PASS - Returns pending reviews with auth

bundles_api.GET /api/bundles/available: PASS - Returns 4 bundles (starter, pro, ultimate, vip_yearly) with auth
bundles_api.bundle_structure: PASS - Each bundle has id, name, name_de, price, bids, vip_days, etc.

social_login_buttons.Apple button behavior: PASS - Shows info toast about Apple Developer Credentials needed

frontend_last_chance.Title: PASS - Shows 'Letzte Chance'
frontend_last_chance.Auction cards: PASS - Shows auction cards with countdown timers and 'JETZT BIETEN' buttons

frontend_reviews.Title: PASS - Shows 'Gewinner-Bewertungen'
frontend_reviews.Empty state: PASS - Shows 'Noch keine Bewertungen' when no reviews

frontend_bundles.Title: PASS - Shows 'Bieter-Bundles'
frontend_bundles.Bundle cards: PASS - Shows 4 bundle cards (Starter, Pro, Ultimate, VIP Jahresabo)
frontend_bundles.Pricing: PASS - Shows original price, discounted price, and savings percentage

frontend_friend_battle.Title: PASS - Shows 'Freunde-Battle'
frontend_friend_battle.Challenge form: PASS - Form shows Friend-ID, Battle-Typ, Dauer, Einsatz options
frontend_friend_battle.Stats cards: PASS - Shows Siege, Abgeschlossene Battles, Aktive Battles, Erhaltene Herausforderungen

critical_code_review_comments: bundles.py: Well-structured with 4 bundles, Stripe integration for payments, proper VIP/Battle Pass fulfillment
last_chance.py: Good time bracket logic, hot auctions based on recent bid activity
friend_battle.py: Complete battle system with challenge/accept/decline flow, leaderboard aggregation
reviews_v2.py: Verified reviews only for won auctions, +2 bids bonus for reviews, admin approval workflow
Login.js/Register.js: Both Google and Apple buttons with correct data-testid attributes and German text
Apple Login: Shows appropriate info toast since Apple Developer Credentials need to be configured
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features_batch.py - Created comprehensive test suite for new features

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages and components working correctly

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test user has 323 bids balance.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New feature batch fully tested. Last Chance: /last-chance shows auctions ending soon with live countdown timers in time brackets. Reviews: /reviews shows public reviews with empty state when no reviews. Bundles: /bundles (auth required) shows 4 bundles (Starter €29.99, Pro €69.99, Ultimate €149.99, VIP Yearly €299.99). Friend Battle: /friend-battle (auth required) shows battle stats and challenge form with battle types. Social Login: Google and Apple buttons on /login and /register, Apple shows info toast about needing credentials. All routes working: /last-chance, /reviews, /bundles, /friend-battle, /api/last-chance/*, /api/reviews/*, /api/bundles/*, /api/friend-battle/*.
